name: Brown Sugar Sweeties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together butter, light brown sugar, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into the butter mixture until well blended.
4. Shape the dough into a disk and refrigerate, wrapped in plastic, for 1 hour.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Work with half of the dough at a time, keeping the remainder refrigerated.
7. Roll out the remaining dough to about 1/4 inch (0.25 inches) thickness between two sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap, or mold into desired shapes.
8. Place the shaped cookies about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 8-15 minutes, or until firm to the touch and lightly browned around the edges.
10. Cool on wire racks.
11. Store in airtight containers.
